form.formComment: Good effort to win last start by half a length over 383m at this track in a handy (22.31), beating Bing Bing Secret. In a purple patch of form and likely to run well again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Good effort to win last start by half a length over 383m at this track in a handy (22.31), beating Bing Bing Secret. In a purple patch of form and likely to run well again.

form.formComment: Was among the placegetters latest at this track when a 5.5 lengths third but did clock a swift 22.28 over the 383m journey. Looms as the one to beat this time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Was among the placegetters latest at this track when a 5.5 lengths third but did clock a swift 22.28 over the 383m journey. Looms as the one to beat this time.

form.formComment: Was among the placegetters latest at this track when a 5 length third but did clock a decent 18.15 over the 312m journey. Harder here and looks a place chance only.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Was among the placegetters latest at this track when a 5 length third but did clock a decent 18.15 over the 312m journey. Harder here and looks a place chance only.

form.formComment: Did a good job two starts back at this track to win by 2.5 lengths in 22.48, beating Zelda Chaos. Last start finished 4th over 312m at this track beaten 2.75 lengths (18.41) behind Chronic in a Grade 3/4 on April 12. Prepared to risk on this occasion.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Did a good job two starts back at this track to win by 2.5 lengths in 22.48, beating Zelda Chaos. Last start finished 4th over 312m at this track beaten 2.75 lengths (18.41) behind Chronic in a Grade 3/4 on April 12. Prepared to risk on this occasion.

form.formComment: Well supported here last start but let backers down, finishing finished 6th on April 3 over 400m at Warragul behind Burn Along beaten 6 lengths (22.95) in a Mix 3/4. Placed two back at Warragul. Well placed and among the chances here.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Well supported here last start but let backers down, finishing finished 6th on April 3 over 400m at Warragul behind Burn Along beaten 6 lengths (22.95) in a Mix 3/4. Placed two back at Warragul. Well placed and among the chances here.

form.formComment: Was a winner three back at this track then finished in the minors before missing the frame last time when fourth (22.40) at this track. Shapes well here on best and gets chance to atone.
